## Links

### Interactive Single Cell Explorer

The link below will take you to an interactive Shiny app which can be used to make
production-ready plots and figures. You can also use this app to explore your own markers and create corresponding feature plots.

```{r explore-link, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
explore_url <- NULL
output_obj <- tryCatch(ezLoadRobj("output"), error = function(e) NULL)
if (!is.null(output_obj)) {
  for (cand in c("Report", "SC Cluster Report", "ScMultiOmics")) {
    if (cand %in% output_obj$colNames) {
      report_path <- output_obj$getColumn(cand)
      if (!is.null(report_path) && nzchar(report_path)) {
        # ScMultiOmics column already points at scMultiData.qs2 directly,
        # the others point at the report directory.
        if (grepl("\\.qs2$", report_path)) {
          explore_url <- paste0("https://fgcz-shiny.uzh.ch/app/exploreSC/?data=", report_path)
        } else {
          explore_url <- paste0("https://fgcz-shiny.uzh.ch/app/exploreSC/?data=",
                                report_path, "/scMultiData.qs2")
        }
        break
      }
    }
  }
}
if (is.null(explore_url)) {
  # Best-effort: build a likely URL from the project + sample name when the
  # report sits inside /srv/gstore/projects/.
  cwd <- getwd()
  m <- regmatches(cwd, regexec("/srv/gstore/projects/(p\\d+)/(.+)", cwd))[[1]]
  if (length(m) == 3) {
    qs2_path <- file.path(m[2], m[3], "scMultiData.qs2")
    explore_url <- paste0("https://fgcz-shiny.uzh.ch/app/exploreSC/?data=", qs2_path)
  }
}
if (!is.null(explore_url) && nzchar(explore_url)) {
  cat(sprintf("[Single Cell Explorer](%s){target=\"_blank\"}\n\n", explore_url))
} else {
  cat("Set `param$exploreSCUrl` to expose a direct link to the scExplorer Shiny app, ",
      "or copy `scMultiData.qs2` to `/srv/gstore/projects/<project>/...` and the ",
      "report will auto-build the URL on the next render.\n")
}
```
